member.name: T:HexLib.Board`2
member.summary: Manages a localized collection of Hexes representing a physical tile map. Connects to other Board instances to form dynamic wargame geometries.
member.typeparam: User-defined type for hex terrain or data.
User-defined type for hexside data (roads, walls, etc.).

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.Name
member.summary: The unique identifier or printed name of this board (e.g., "Board A"). Used natively to resolve naming collisions for overlapping joined hexes.

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.TopOrientation
member.summary: The physical geometric layout of the hexes on this board.

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.Width
member.summary: The effective width of the board, swapped dynamically if the board is rotated 90/270 degrees.

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.Height
member.summary: The effective height of the board, swapped dynamically if the board is rotated 90/270 degrees.

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.Manager
member.summary: The manager controlling the global map scope this board belongs to, if any.

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.Orientation
member.summary: The visual reading orientation of the board map grid. Cannot be altered while the board is joined to neighbors or managed globally.

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.HalfHexSides
member.summary: Specifies which edges of the board contain half-hexes, used for seamless joining.

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.ShiftingOddColumns
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether odd columns (indices 1, 3, etc.) are shifted down relative to even columns. Default is true. Used as a hint for offset coordinate translations and UI rendering.

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.Hexes
member.summary: A read-only collection of all hexes strictly owned by this board, keyed by their logical coordinates.

member.name: P:HexLib.Board`2.Neighbors
member.summary: A read-only collection of other boards physically joined to this board, keyed by the edge they attach to.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,HexLib.HexTopOrientation)
member.summary: Initializes a new, unlinked with the specified physical width and height in hexes and physical orientation.
member.param: The physical width of the board.
The physical height of the board.
The hex geometric layout (defaults to PointyTopped).

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.GetOppositeEdge(HexLib.BoardEdge)
member.summary: Returns the opposite physical edge for a given edge alignment.
member.param: The edge to evaluate.
member.exception: Thrown if an invalid or compound edge is passed.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.CanJoin(HexLib.Board{`0,`1},HexLib.BoardEdge)
member.summary: Evaluates if another given board can be physically attached to this board on the specified edge. Checks for valid half-hex edge configurations and dimension matching.
member.param: The board attempting to connect.
The single physical edge direction on this board to join.
member.returns: true if the join is valid; otherwise false.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.GetPhysicalNeighbor(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.PhysicalDirection)
member.summary: Attempts to locate the adjacent hex in the specified physical direction, seamlessly crossing board boundaries if joined to a neighbor.
member.param: The starting physical coordinate.
The physical direction to travel.
member.returns: The neighboring hex if it exists, either natively or on a joined board, or null.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.GetMirrorHexOnEdge(HexLib.BoardEdge,HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.Board{`0,`1})
member.summary: Helper for to retrieve a hex from a neighbor board that aligns with a specified incoming edge.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.DetectCrossedEdge(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Determines which logical board edge was crossed when moving from one coordinate to another.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.GetPhysicalOffset_Internal(HexLib.PhysicalDirection)
member.summary: Internal helper to get a cube-coordinate offset for a specific physical direction.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.Join(HexLib.Board{`0,`1},HexLib.BoardEdge,System.Func{HexLib.Hex{`0},HexLib.Hex{`0},HexLib.Hex{`0}})
member.summary: Physically links another board to this board on the specified edge, establishing neighbor tracking and half-hex resolution.
member.param: The board to join.
The edge on this board to connect.
An optional selector function to determine which overlapping half-hex should act as the primary, physical hex.
member.exception: Thrown if the join validation fails.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.Unlink(HexLib.BoardEdge)
member.summary: Severs the physical link and half-hex overlaps with the board joined on the specified edge.
member.param: The edge to unlink.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.AddHex(HexLib.Hex{`0})
member.summary: Explicitly registers a hex to this board. The hex's logical location must be unique on the board.
member.param: The hex to add.
member.exception: Thrown if the hex is null.
Thrown if a hex already exists at the target logical location.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.GetHexAt(HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve a hex residing locally on this board given a strictly logical coordinate.
member.param: The logical coordinate relative to this board's origin.
member.returns: The hex if found; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.RemoveHexAt(HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Removes a hex at the specified logical coordinate from this board.
member.param: The logical coordinate of the hex to remove.
member.returns: true if a hex was found and removed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.SetEdgeData(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.CubeCoordinate,`1)
member.summary: Registers or updates metadata for a physical edge between two hexes. Order of coordinates does not matter.

member.name: M:HexLib.Board`2.GetEdgeData(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Retrieves metadata for a physical edge between two hexes. Returns default if no data is registered.

member.name: T:HexLib.BoardEdge
member.summary: Bitwise flags representing the physical edges of a rectangular map board that contain half-hexes, intended to be joined directly to half-hexes on adjacent map boards.

member.name: F:HexLib.BoardEdge.None
member.summary: No board edges.

member.name: F:HexLib.BoardEdge.Top
member.summary: The top edge of the coordinate space.

member.name: F:HexLib.BoardEdge.Right
member.summary: The right edge of the coordinate space.

member.name: F:HexLib.BoardEdge.Bottom
member.summary: The bottom edge of the coordinate space.

member.name: F:HexLib.BoardEdge.Left
member.summary: The left edge of the coordinate space.

member.name: T:HexLib.BoardManager`2
member.summary: Manages a topological graph of independent Boards, translating their local coordinate spaces into a unified global coordinate plane for overarching geometric math and pathfinding.
member.typeparam: User-defined type for hex terrain or data.

member.name: P:HexLib.BoardManager`2.AnchorBoard
member.summary: The primary board defining the origin (0,0) of the global offset space.

member.name: P:HexLib.BoardManager`2.Boards
member.summary: Gets all boards currently managed by this instance.

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.SetAnchorBoard(HexLib.Board{`0,`1})
member.summary: Establishes the provided board as the (0,0) anchor of the global map, automatically importing any boards already connected to it via its Neighbors graph.
member.param: The board to set as the Anchor.

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.AddBoard(HexLib.Board{`0,`1},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Adds a detached board explicitly at the provided global physical offsets. Automatically imports any boards already connected to it.

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.RegisterBoardWithCluster(HexLib.Board{`0,`1},System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Recursively registers a board and all its connected neighbors into the manager.

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.CalculateNeighborGlobalOffset(HexLib.Board{`0,`1},System.Int32,System.Int32,HexLib.Board{`0,`1},HexLib.BoardEdge)
member.summary: Calculates the global offset of a neighbor board relative to a source board based on join direction.

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.JoinBoard(HexLib.Board{`0,`1},HexLib.Board{`0,`1},HexLib.BoardEdge)
member.summary: Explicitly joins a detached board to an already managed board, calculating and registering its global offset.

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.RemoveBoard(System.String)
member.summary: Unregisters and physically disconnects a board from the manager's global graph. Re-anchors the global plane if the removed board was the anchor.
member.param: The unique name of the board to remove.

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.GetHexById(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a hex by its ID or by a combination of Board Name and Hex ID. If multiple hexes match the query, or if no hexes match, an exception is thrown.
member.param: The hex ID to search for, optionally prefixed with the board name (e.g., 'U6' or '3U6').

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.ToGlobalCoordinate(HexLib.Hex{`0})
member.summary: Translates a given Hex's local logical coordinate into the Manager's unified global CubeCoordinate space.

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.GetPhysicalCubeFromLogical(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.BoardOrientation)
member.summary: Translates a logical cube coordinate to a physical cube coordinate based on board rotation.

member.name: M:HexLib.BoardManager`2.GetDistance(HexLib.Hex{`0},HexLib.Hex{`0})
member.summary: Measures the exact physical distance in hexes between two hexes on the global map graph.

member.name: T:HexLib.BoardOrientation
member.summary: Represents the supported physical orientations of a board in 90-degree increments.

member.name: F:HexLib.BoardOrientation.Degree0
member.summary: Standard, unrotated alignment.

member.name: F:HexLib.BoardOrientation.Degree90
member.summary: Rotated 90 degrees clockwise.

member.name: F:HexLib.BoardOrientation.Degree180
member.summary: Rotated 180 degrees (upside down).

member.name: F:HexLib.BoardOrientation.Degree270
member.summary: Rotated 270 degrees clockwise (or 90 counter-clockwise).

member.name: T:HexLib.CubeCoordinate
member.summary: An immutable coordinate system for hexagonal grids using 3 axes (q, r, s) where q + r + s = 0. Provides math operators and rotation translations.

member.name: P:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.Q
member.summary: The Q (column-like) axis of the cube coordinate.

member.name: P:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.R
member.summary: The R (row-like) axis of the cube coordinate.

member.name: P:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.S
member.summary: The S axis of the cube coordinate, balancing the sum to zero.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new cube coordinate. Throws if the sum of axes is not 0.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.op_Addition(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Adds two cube coordinates together.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.op_Subtraction(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Subtracts one cube coordinate from another.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.op_Multiply(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,System.Int32)
member.summary: Multiplies a cube coordinate by a scalar value.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.DistanceTo(HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Calculates the Manhattan distance (in hexes) to another cube coordinate.
member.param: The target coordinate.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.Rotate60
member.summary: Rotates the coordinate 60 degrees around the origin.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.Rotate120
member.summary: Rotates the coordinate 120 degrees around the origin.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.Rotate180
member.summary: Rotates the coordinate 180 degrees around the origin.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.Rotate240
member.summary: Rotates the coordinate 240 degrees around the origin.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.Rotate300
member.summary: Rotates the coordinate 300 degrees around the origin.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.op_Equality(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Determines if two cube coordinates are equal.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.op_Inequality(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Determines if two cube coordinates are not equal.

member.name: M:HexLib.CubeCoordinate.GetNeighbor(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the adjacent neighbor coordinate in the specified direction index (0-5).
member.param: The direction index to get the neighbor for.

member.name: T:HexLib.Hex`1
member.summary: Represents a single hex space on the board, holding its coordinates, its physical identity, and any counters occupying it.
member.typeparam: The type of game-specific metadata associated with the hex (e.g., terrain type).

member.name: P:HexLib.Hex`1.Id
member.summary: The physical identifier for this hex (e.g., "A1" or "0103").

member.name: P:HexLib.Hex`1.Location
member.summary: The logical cube coordinate identifying this hex's unrotated location relative to its parent board's origin.

member.name: P:HexLib.Hex`1.Metadata
member.summary: Game-specific metadata for this hex (e.g., Terrain, Elevation).

member.name: P:HexLib.Hex`1.PrimaryHexAlias
member.summary: Specifies the Primary hex that this hex delegates its counter storage to, used when joining half-hex boards.

member.name: P:HexLib.Hex`1.Counters
member.summary: A read-only collection of counters present in this hex.

member.name: M:HexLib.Hex`1.#ctor(HexLib.CubeCoordinate)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class at the specified logical coordinates.
member.param: The logical position relative to the board's top-left origin.

member.name: M:HexLib.Hex`1.AddCounter(HexLib.ICounter)
member.summary: Adds a counter to this hex. If this hex delegates to a primary alias, the counter is added there instead.
member.param: The counter to add.
member.exception: Thrown if the counter is null.

member.name: M:HexLib.Hex`1.RemoveCounter(HexLib.ICounter)
member.summary: Removes a counter from this hex. If this hex delegates to a primary alias, it is removed from there instead.
member.param: The counter to remove.
member.returns: true if the counter was successfully found and removed; otherwise, false.
member.exception: Thrown if the counter is null.

member.name: T:HexLib.HexMath
member.summary: Helper to handle coordinate conversions for hexes, supporting both pointy-topped (odd-R) and flat-topped (odd-Q) layouts.

member.name: M:HexLib.HexMath.ToOffset(HexLib.CubeCoordinate,HexLib.HexTopOrientation)
member.summary: Converts cube coordinates to offset coordinates (column, row).
member.param: The cube coordinate to convert.
The top orientation of the hex grid.
member.returns: A tuple containing the mapped column and row.

member.name: M:HexLib.HexMath.OffsetToCube(System.Int32,System.Int32,HexLib.HexTopOrientation)
member.summary: Converts offset coordinates (column, row) to cube coordinates.
member.param: The column coordinate.
The row coordinate.
The top orientation of the hex grid.

member.name: T:HexLib.HexTopOrientation
member.summary: Represents the physical geometry layout of hexes on a wargame board.

member.name: F:HexLib.HexTopOrientation.PointyTopped
member.summary: Hexes have a pointy top (Odd-R offset layout). Most common in wargames.

member.name: F:HexLib.HexTopOrientation.FlatTopped
member.summary: Hexes have a flat top (Odd-Q offset layout).

member.name: T:HexLib.ICounter
member.summary: Represents a generic unit, marker, or token placed on a Hex in the wargaming simulation.

member.name: P:HexLib.ICounter.Name
member.summary: The display name or unique identifier of the counter.

member.name: T:HexLib.Persistence.FileStorageAdapter
member.summary: A file-system based implementation of .

member.name: M:HexLib.Persistence.FileStorageAdapter.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The root directory where files will be stored.

member.name: T:HexLib.Persistence.IStorageAdapter
member.summary: Defines a storage medium adapter for persisting raw data. Allows swapping between File System, SQLite, Cloud Storage, etc.

member.name: M:HexLib.Persistence.IStorageAdapter.SaveAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Saves the provided string data to the specified key/identifier.

member.name: M:HexLib.Persistence.IStorageAdapter.LoadAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Loads the string data associated with the specified key/identifier.

member.name: M:HexLib.Persistence.IStorageAdapter.ListKeysAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Lists all available keys/identifiers under a specific category or prefix.

member.name: M:HexLib.Persistence.IStorageAdapter.DeleteAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes the data associated with the specified key/identifier.

member.name: T:HexLib.PhysicalDirection
member.summary: Represents the 6 physical cardinal directions of movement on a pointy-top hex grid.

member.name: F:HexLib.PhysicalDirection.North
member.summary: Direction pointing directly up (used primarily in FlatTopped layouts).

member.name: F:HexLib.PhysicalDirection.NorthWest
member.summary: Direction pointing top-left.

member.name: F:HexLib.PhysicalDirection.NorthEast
member.summary: Direction pointing top-right.

member.name: F:HexLib.PhysicalDirection.East
member.summary: Direction pointing directly right (used primarily in PointyTopped layouts).

member.name: F:HexLib.PhysicalDirection.SouthEast
member.summary: Direction pointing bottom-right.

member.name: F:HexLib.PhysicalDirection.South
member.summary: Direction pointing directly down (used primarily in FlatTopped layouts).

member.name: F:HexLib.PhysicalDirection.SouthWest
member.summary: Direction pointing bottom-left.

member.name: F:HexLib.PhysicalDirection.West
member.summary: Direction pointing directly left (used primarily in PointyTopped layouts).

member.name: T:HexLib.PhysicalDirectionExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for the enum, particularly for rotation logic.

member.name: M:HexLib.PhysicalDirectionExtensions.RotateClockwise(HexLib.PhysicalDirection,System.Int32,HexLib.HexTopOrientation)
member.summary: Rotates the specified direction clockwise by a fixed number of 60-degree hex steps.
member.param: The starting direction.
The number of steps to rotate clockwise (can be negative for counter-clockwise).
The visual orientation of the hex grid, determining which 6 directions are valid.
member.exception: Thrown if the provided direction is invalid for the specified orientation.
